name: Chargebee
description: Connect to Chargebee to sync subscriptions, customers, and invoices from your billing account.

install_fields.label: Site
install_fields.description: Your Chargebee site name (e.g. 'acme' from acme.chargebee.com).

install_fields.label: API Key
install_fields.description: Your Chargebee API key from Settings → Configure Chargebee → API Keys.
